Given these contrasting characteristics, I would place glass closer to the middle of the spectrum, acknowledging its inherent fragility while also recognizing its potential for durability. header_20.raw_response: The clue 'Genius' leans more towards the hardworking side of the spectrum, but it doesn't entirely rule out the possibility of luck.
